pages.text:
th.

1.10

UN

BRITIS EMBASSY

PARIS.

for coter, 2953.

Monsieur le Président,

I have the honour, on instructions from His lajesty's

Principal Secretary of State for foreign affairs, to notify Your

Excellency of the desire of His Majesty's Government in the United.

Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, that the provision of the Convention relating to Exhibiti na signed at Paris on the 22nd Lovember 1928, as amended by the protocol signed at Paris on the 10th May 1948, should be extended to the Bahamas. Ihis notif cation 18 made in accordancd with the provision of paragraph (b) of Article 34 of the Convention.

I have the honour to request that you will acknowledge the receipt of this communication and inform ue of the date of its receipt by the French Governe t.

want have the onour to be, wit the highest consideration,

ho sieur le Président,

Iour Excellency's obedient Servant,

Givatarus

-

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères,

Paris.
